subcodes.first_line: The essence of remembrance and praise befitteth the Desired One, Who through His blessed Word "Verily, I am God" hath illumined the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر ذکر و ثنا حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که بکلمه مبارکه انی انا الله عالم را
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
